description_long: This helmet features a domed metallic crown with a dark, aged bronze finish, adorned with two prominent, upward-curving black horns on either side. The front displays a decorative floral or filigree motif etched into the metal above the brow. Extending downward from the helmet is a chainmail aventail that covers the sides and back of the head and neck, providing additional protection. The chainmail appears to be made of interlinked metal rings, draping loosely and flaring outward at the bottom. The top of the helmet is capped with a central spike, adding a distinctive and intimidating element. The overall design suggests a historical or fantasy style, suitable for ceremonial or combat use.
description: A bronze-domed helmet with black horns, a central spike, and a chainmail aventail for neck protection, featuring decorative etching on the brow.
description_view_0: Front view shows the domed helmet with two black horns, central spike, decorative brow etching, and chainmail aventail flaring at the sides.
description_view_1: Left side view highlights the profile of one horn, the spike, and the draping chainmail covering the side of the head and neck.
description_view_2: Rear view displays both horns symmetrically, the central spike, and the full extent of the chainmail aventail covering the back.
description_view_3: Right side view mirrors the left, showing the horn, spike, and chainmail draping down the side.
attribute_graphic_design: Decorative floral or filigree motif etched on the brow; otherwise plain metallic and chainmail surfaces.
